title: Fear Nightfall
description: Made for CO-OP. A unique, immersive and difficult horror modpack with a campaign and tons of custom content.
body:
![banner](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/63509824badf065d44d98f329dcbfb7f4ca12866/desc/fear-nightfall/banner.png?raw=true)

![vr](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Virtual%20Reality&message=How%20to%20play?&color=393939&labelColor=8c4c33&style=for-the-badge&logo=Oculus&logoColor=white)
![vc](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Voice%20Chat&message=How%20to%20set%20up?&color=393939&labelColor=8c4c33&style=for-the-badge&logo=teamspeak&logoColor=white)
![dc](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=8c4c33&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)

![Features: A unique, immersive and difficult horror experience. Featuring custom content, linear progression, a final boss, and a custom version of the Hysteria Shader made specifically for Fear Nightfall. Perfect for co-op, with built-in proximity voice chat.  Campaign: Remains of Chaos. After Herobrine's defeat, chaos has spread everywhere. Greater beings born of chaos now reign on all dimensions. Can you progress through the 7 chapters and defeat all chaos beings to restore peace to all dimensions? Immerse Yourself: Native VR Support Feel the horror in the most immersive way possible. Fully optimized and compatible for VR. Supports all VR headsets with SteamVR support.](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/fear-nightfall/1.png?raw=true)

[![alt text](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fz4uivqmzunmkvtqd5hgu/tY38mPK.png?rlkey=qin5rs3z35sc2dgw82rrivsvp&st=5ikn6u6o&dl=1)](ttps://www.bisecthosting.com/p/lunapixel)
